titleStmt.title: SII 24.28: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 28. (A.R. No. 109 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Seems to record a gift of land in Viḷattūr-nāḍu to Chōḷa-Kēraḷanallūruḍaiyāṉ Ādittaṉ Vēdavanamuḍaiyāṉ alias Nēriyaṉ Mūvēndavēḷār for a flower garden (tirunandavaṉappuṟam) for supplying two hundred garlands and some specified quantity of paddy to the temple at the instance of Nishadarājar, the Śrīkāryam officer of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
....svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻcūḻnta puviyil poṉnemiyaḷavunta
nneminaṭappa viḷaṅku cayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkara
koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilālp potumaṇam puṇarntu
matuvaraiyiṭṭa l muṉaik kontaḷavaracar tantaḷamiri
ṟai kaḻittu to ttik kirttiyai ni
vaṭaticaivākai mala kaḷ potumai
maiyun tavira vantu punitat tiruma
ṇimakuṭa cūṭit taṉnaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat toṉnila ventar
cūṭa muṉṉai maṉuvāṟu perukak kaliyāru pa ceṅkol ticai toṟu
kuṭai Irunilaviḷākam ve tiru ṇilāttikaḻa meruvil
puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟipānta cori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vila
navaṉ karuntalai paru titṭa puṟattiṭai kiṭappavaṉ nāḷ viṟ
piṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyeniluñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kai vil letir
ṉ kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuveṉa tuṅkapattiraiyaḷa ṉum paṭṭa
kaḷi muṅkiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mu nta natikaḷu
ṉṟuṭain rit talamarak kuṭaticai ṉum
tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapalamutukum payantetir māṟiya jayap
kuṭutta pukaḻiṉ celviyu kaṇ maṭantayariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta raiyu
m kaṅkamaṇṭala pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikko
yapukaḻoṭu taṭaittāḷi veḷḷa
tan tiravā ntu vaṭakaṭal teṉ kaṭal peruñceṉai
ñcavarai kaḷattañci veruneḷit toṭi ppukka kāṭaṟattu
ṭait paṭip meṟṟik koṟṟa vi
jayastampa ticaitoṟuṉniṟutti muttiṉ calāpamum] muttamiṭ matta ve
ṅkari paṭumaiyyalac caiyyamum kaṉniyuṅ kaik koṇṭaruḷit teṉṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭikaṭa
l malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟallām yataṉ varutanit talaivaraik kurukalar kulai
yak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa(ṭa) neṟito koḷ viraciṅkācaṉan tiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅko
ḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pol vīra ṅka mevalar vaṇaṅka vīṟṟiruntaruḷiṉa
ko Irājakecari vaṉacakkaravattikaḷ [śrī kulottu]ṅka coḻa tevarkku yā 6vatu pāṇ
ṭi kulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭ tiruvaraṅka śrīkāriyañ ceykira niṣatarājar
paṭṭayam śrīvayiṣṇava vamuṭai yāṉum lūr kaṇṇa
puramuṭaiyāṉāṉa cempi Aḻakiya maṇavāḷaṉum śrīvaiṣṇavasitta
tāsaṉum ṟi vaṭakopuramuṭaiyāṉu śrīvīranārāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattu śrīvayiṣṇavatāsaṉum
śrī paṇṭā ṉ kurukaikāvalan A ṉum Āritaṉ tiruvāykula muṭaiyāṉ cirākavaṉum pāratayeṉ
kecuvaṉ Aṟa taruvāṉ tiruvaraṅ śrīkṛṣṇaṉum pāratāyan Ārāvamutu cirāmaṉum Āritaṉ keca
van tani Iḷañciṅkamum kkaṇakku pe lakol periya koyil piriyaṉum śrīvayiṣṇavak
kaṇakku vempaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāna Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa piriyaṉum Āka Ivvaṉaivomu vicaiya rājentra vaḷanāṭṭu
valivalakkūṟṟattuc coḷakeraḷanallūruṭaiyāṉ Ātittaṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉāṉa neriyaṉ mūven
taveḷānukku nāṅkaḷ Aṭuttukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkatevar tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāna
Iviḷattūr nāṭṭu taṇṭuṟaiyilum kāraikkuṭiyilum Āṟuṭaintup
ṟum nūṟu kiṭantu pulāṅkuṭaiyār pūranātittatevaṉārāṉa kāṭ
m Ātitta tevaṉukku Ittirunaṉtavaṉap puṟamāka viṭṭanilat
tukkicainta kiḻpāṟkellai tirumaṅkaimayakkaṉukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kārai
kkuṭi nilattukkum taṇṭuṟaiyil naraciṅkamayakkalukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai
tiruvaraṅkamayakkalukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kāverikkulaikkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta pe
ru nāṉ kellaiyillakappaṭṭa kuḻi Āyirattaiññūṟṟeḻupattaiñcināl nilam mukkāle
mukkāṇiyum Ittirunaṉtavaṉappuṟamākak kalluveṭṭik kiṭantamaiyil In nilatti
l Ivar tirutti tirunantavaṉappuṟamāka Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nilam Āṟumā Innilam Āṟumāvu
m pokki nikki niṉṟa nilam Oṉpatu mā mukkāṇiyum Ittirunaṉtavaṉat tukku OṟṟamāyRead oṟṟiyāy
veṇṭāmaiyilum Ivar tūrapa ppireṟṟu vittilāmaiyilum Ivvicainta
perunāṉkellaiyilum kiḻakkaṭaiya Oṉpatumā mukkāṇiyum kuṭutta paricāvatu I
nnilattukkup puṉcai varicaippaṭi ve kku nellu E �ka nellu mu
kkalane Irutūṇip patakku Aṟunāḻi Uḻakku ḻākke � ḻvār tiruvaraṅka
devar śrīpaṇṭāratte paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl ti Aḷakkak kaṭava
ṉ Ākavum Iṉnilattāl Iṉnellaḷantu mikuti koṇṭu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅka devarkkuc
cā(ra)ttiyaruḷa nittam Iruṉūru centāmarait tiruppaḷḷittāmam pū ppaṇi māṟuvār
Iruvarkku perāl nelluk kuṟuṇi nā ṉāḻiyāka Onṟukku nellu
vai mutalukkup perālk kācu Iraṇṭākak kācu nāluk n nilaṅ koṇ
nittamum mula l Irunūṟu centāmarait tiruppaḷḷittāma
llatu paṉmai ṭṭup peruvari kuṭi
maikaḷ Epperpaṭṭa ṉallātāṉā Ivvāṇṭu nāḷ
munṉūṟṟirupatu munṟuta vilai nilam Iraṇṭumāvin kīḻi Arai Iraṇṭumāviṉ
kiḻaraikkut tiruttuk kūli kācu Āṟum Innilam Oṉpatum mukkāṇikkum vilai kācu Onṟum Ā
kak kācu 7 Ikkācu yeḻu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkadevar śrīpaṇṭāratte vaippittuk koṇṭu Ippari
ce Iṉnilam Oṉpatumā mukkāṇiyuṅ kaikkoṇṭu tirutti puncey vari caippaṭi
nellum Aḷantu mikuti koṇṭu Ittaṉmam cantirāti
kāka Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkatevarku
ku Ivai sabhaik kaṇakkup peṟakkaṭavate
koyiṟ piriyaṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭikku śrīva
ku U Uṭaiyānāṉa Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
lūr tiruvaraṅkadāsaṉ Eḻuttu Itu pāratāyaṉ tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa śrīkṛṣṇan
sayiññai Itu pāratāyan kecuvaṉ Aṟivariyāṉ sayiññai Āri
taṉ kurukai kāvalaṉ Ārāvamutiṉ sayiññai Ivai perumpuliyūr ku
ruva kkula vainālūr Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉ E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kulamuṭaiyāṉ śrīrākavaṉ Eḻuttu I
vai śrī ṣṇadāsaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māṅkaḷūr śrīto
ṇṭaraṭippoṭi dāsaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cempiyaṉ mātevi AThe continuation is built in.
Digital edition of SII 24.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
